subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the most exalted, most holy court of the Beloved One, Who hath set His loved ones ablaze with the fire of His love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که اولیائش را بنار محبتش مشتعل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
